name: Python Foundations
description: Master the basic building blocks: output, math, and variables.

name: Decision Making
description: Control the flow of your program using logic and conditionals.

name: Loops & Automation
description: Learn to repeat tasks efficiently using while and for loops.

name: Data Collections
description: Organize and manage multiple pieces of data using lists.

name: Reusable Tools
description: Write cleaner code by creating your own reusable functions.

name: Building Projects
description: Apply your skills to build non-interactive Python applications.
